_metadata.description: Maps a publisher to an anonymous device ID and P-256 public key for blind routing.

field_dictionary.id: UUID - Primary identifier for this directory row.
field_dictionary.device_id: UUID - Anonymous device identifier stored in Keychain.
field_dictionary.public_key: String - Base64 P-256 public key for E2EE.
field_dictionary.is_elder: Boolean - Whether this device holds a full elder directory.
